sentence: Why, little Barnaby is not five weeks old till next Wednesday {206} morning, half past three o’clock.

sentence: As they approached Governor Winthrop’s they observed that, instead of the profound darkness and silence that usually reigned in that exemplary mansion at eleven o’clock, the house seemed to be in great bustle.
title: Hope Leslie

sentence: He dismissed Barnaby with an order to appear before him with his prisoners at six o’clock the following morning.
